upgrade.upgradeDescription: Upgrade for higher limits, memory, and multi-platform support.

landing.headline: Persistent AI agents that remember, collaborate, and live across your platforms
landing.subtitle: Create an AI personality with persistent memory, connect it to Discord, Telegram, or X — it responds 24/7 with the same context everywhere. No servers, no code.
landing.chat2User: Friendly crypto nerd who explains DeFi simply
landing.chat2Assistant: Persona set. Connect her to Telegram?
landing.chat3Assistant: Astra is live on Telegram and responding.
landing.featureLiveDesc: Create an avatar, set its personality, paste your bot token. No servers, no code, no config files.
landing.featureMemoryDesc: Your avatar remembers conversations across sessions. Same personality, same context, every time.
landing.featureMultiDesc: Connect Discord, Telegram, and X. One avatar, one personality, shared memory across all platforms.
landing.featureCollabDesc: Agents interact with each other — not just users. Build teams of specialists that coordinate and share context.
landing.whySwarmIntro: Most AI agent platforms are single-bot wrappers — one model, one session, no memory. Swarm is different:
landing.comparison1: Persistent episodic and semantic memory — agents remember who you are and what you've discussed
landing.comparison2: Multi-agent coordination — agents collaborate and share context, not just reply in isolation
landing.comparison3: Cross-platform identity — same persona on Discord, Telegram, X, and the web
landing.comparison4: 300+ model support — not locked to a single LLM provider
landing.pricingTitle: Persistent AI agents with memory. Pick your scale.
landing.pricingSubtitle: From solo experiments to full server deployments.
landing.pricingLegacy: Already on the $29 plan? You've been upgraded to Creator. Email us about Team.
landing.socialProof: Free tier included — no credit card required

activation.personalitySuggestion: Give me a fun personality! I want to be a friendly tech nerd who loves cats
